observe: Faster isn't the whole score here. Watch all five numbers, not just the one that looks good.
fault: High utilization, terrible response. Something's hogging the Core while the rest of you starve.
repair: Read the dashboard. Find which number is lying to you.
escape: No time to study it slowly. Call the flag before it scrolls past.

observe: Scheduling criteria include utilization, throughput, turnaround, waiting, and response time.
fault: A metric has exceeded its acceptable threshold.
repair: Identify which scheduling metric is degraded.
escape: Confirm the flagged metric before the trace ends.

hints: High utilization doesn't guarantee good response time — check both.
